productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Cap
description: Thisblue knit beanie from united colors of benetton makes for a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. Designed to offer snug comfort, this beanie is a great way to beat the chill and enjoy those long winter walks.Made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylonNearly seamless stitching for abrasion-free comfortFoldable hem for style and comfortCareHand wash in warm water and line dryDo not dry clean, bleach, wring or iron
